title: bursera permollis
intro: Bursera permollis, also known as the 'Ocotillo' or 'Desert Ironwood', is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Bursera permollis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Bursera permollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional folk remedies and modern supplements.
